highlights.title: Content Pipelines DB Schema
highlights.description: Add content_pipelines, pipeline_sources and pipeline_targets tables with source channels, target dialogs, LLM/image model config, publish mode and scheduling interval.

highlights.title: Pipeline Web UI
highlights.description: Full CRUD for content pipelines at /pipelines: create, edit, delete, toggle active state, configure source channels and target dialogs.

highlights.title: Pipeline CLI
highlights.description: pipeline list|add|edit|delete|toggle subcommands for full CLI parity with the web interface.

highlights.title: Prompt Template Engine
highlights.description: Validated template variables ({source_messages}, {channel_title}, {topic}, {date}) with configurable agent prompt templates via Web UI and CLI.
